title: Knight's Armory骑士的武备库
description: focus on the "Epicknights" and its addons mods so far专注于史诗骑士与其附属系列的材质重绘，史实而精致
body:
looking for quality battle gaming experience?
This resourcepack retextured some popular mod's arms&armor into a higher resolution , based on it original texture, more details, also be historical , and  delicated

it mainly focus on the "Epicknights" and its addons mods so far

Thanks the textures sharing and Excellent works from the cole3050.

_

Epic Knights: Shields, Armor and Weapons [Fabric & Forge]Epic_Knights
_

Epic Knights: Slavic ArmoryEpicKnights:Slavic_Armory
_

Epic Knights: AddonEpicKnights:addon
-

Epic Knights: Ores and Alloys
[ already got the mod author's permisson]

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Epic Knights: Antique Legacy 
and the early medieval stuff coming in the future will have it own individual pack

 find it in my other works.


-not inculding tons of armor's icons so far now.
Repaint all of them into 32X resolution with quality is going to be a great work.

-also include the vanilla armors and weapons in early medieval style to keep them more balanced to compat the mainly mods contents.

what we/I got from now
:-Epicknight [done]
_Epicknight_addon [done]
_Epicknight_slavic_armory [done]
_EpicFight[except the books ]

here's my other works:

-

Knight's_Armory:Antique_Lagacy32X32
what we/I will do in future
_keep updating with magistu and his team's new contents.

we decide to set up a discord group to share and make 32x textures in all the stylish ideas

if you got interest just contact me.

Projects_Discord_Channel

enjoy
